data.title: "Global Trivia Tournament "Year of the Horse" launched by Masters of Trivia for Lunar New Year 2026 brings culture, learning, and competition."
data.description: In Boerne, Texas on February 17, 2026, the company Masters of Trivia introduced a seasonal zodiac challenge. This challenge combines educational cultural facts suitable for classrooms, enjoyable activities for everyday life, and tournament-style play enhanced by technology. The platform offers performance-based rewards, creating an engaging experience for players worldwide.

data.title: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, Inc. will host investor call on Feb. 18, 2026, at 3 p.m. CT.
data.description: Cardio Diagnostics, a company based in Chicago, is set to hold an investor conference call on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 3 p.m. CT. The call presents an opportunity for interested parties to engage with the company regarding its financial performance, strategies, and future outlook. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to participate in this event to gain insights into Cardio Diagnostics' operations and growth prospects.

data.title: Earth Science Tech, Inc. engages Semple, Marchal & Cooper LLP as independent PCAOB auditor for audits.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Miami, Florida, Earth Science Tech, Inc. (OTC: ETST) revealed their collaboration with Semple, Marchal & Cooper, LLP ("Semple") as the new independent auditor for Public Company Accounting Oversight Board (PCAOB). ETST, a strategic holding company emphasizing a varied health and wellness portfolio, made this announcement.

data.title: Investors Title Company reports $7.5M net income for Q4 2025, 1.6% decrease in revenue to $69.5M compared to last year.
data.description: Investors Title Company (Nasdaq: ITIC) based in Chapel Hill, N.C., released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. During this period, the Company recorded a net income of $7.5 million, translating to $3.97 per diluted share. This represents a decrease from the previous year's figures of $8.4 million in net income, equivalent to $4.41 per diluted share. Revenues for the quarter saw a 1.6% decline, dropping to $69.5 million from $70.6 million in the same period last year. The reduction in revenues was primarily attributed to a decrease in net premiums written, which was partly offset by an increase in non-title services.
Filing 8.3 for Picton Property Income Ltd. disclosed today without specifying the source.

data.title: Stella Mental Health opens new Newton clinic in Boston, expanding access to psychiatric care. Chief Psychiatric Officer Dr. Brian Boyle selected as 2026 National SPRAVATO® Bureau Speaker.
data.description: In Boston on February 17, 2026, Stella Mental Health is increasing availability of advanced interventional psychiatric services in Greater Boston by launching Stella Newton, its second location in Massachusetts. The expansion coincides with national acclaim for a Boston-based facility.

data.title: Clerri completes SOC 2 Type I Audit, ensuring enterprise-grade security for dental groups and practices.
data.description: Clerri, the leading membership platform in the dental industry, has reached a significant milestone in enhancing enterprise-grade security for dental groups and practices. The company, based in Austin, Texas, disclosed on February 17, 2026, that it has successfully finalized its System implementation. This achievement underscores Clerri's dedication to ensuring top-notch security measures for its clients.

data.title: 85% of American homeowners faced unexpected repair costs, 38% spent $5,000+ on renovations, and 23% spent $10,000+.
data.description: In 2025, a significant portion of American homeowners, comprising 38%, invested a minimum of $5,000 into home renovation endeavors, while 23% allocated a minimum of $10,000 for such projects. The city of St. Louis witnessed these trends firsthand on February 17, 2026, according to PRNewswire. The report from Clever revealed that a majority, specifically 85%, of homeowners engaged in unplanned home repairs, indicating a substantial financial commitment to maintaining their residences.

data.title: GMA Consulting celebrates 20 years as the top consulting firm in gaming, hospitality, and sports industries.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Las Vegas, GMA Consulting ("GMA"), a top research and advisory firm specializing in gaming, hospitality, and sports industries, marked the beginning of its third decade in business. Having recently celebrated its 20th anniversary, the firm is known as a global leader in its field.

data.title: American Flat Track and All Kids Bike collaborate on fundraiser to provide $27,000 for learn-to-ride bike programs.
data.description: In Daytona Beach, Florida on February 17, 2026, Progressive American Flat Track, under AMA Pro Racing, revealed an exciting initiative called the Quarters for Kids Campaign. The campaign aims to support bike learning programs by funding $27,000 through All Kids Bike. Throughout the 2026 Progressive AFT Season, a significant sum of money will be invested in this cause, demonstrating a commitment to empowering kids through two-wheel education.

data.title: OSI Systems to present at Citi's 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on Feb 19 at 1:00 PM ET.
data.description: HAWTHORNE, Calif.-- OSI Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSIS) shared news of their upcoming presentation at the Citi 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on February 19, 2026, at 1:00 PM ET. For those interested, the live webcast will be accessible through the investor relations section of the OSI Systems website. OSI Systems is known for its design and production of specialized electronic systems and components tailored for crucial applications. The corporation functions...

data.title: Moleculin receives Japanese patent approval for Annamycin. Patent expected in months.
data.description: Houston-based company Moleculin Biotech, Inc. (Nasdaq: MBRX) revealed that the Japan Patent Office (JPO) has granted a notice of allowance for Patent Application No. 2021-577862, named “METHOD OF RECONSTITUTING LIPOSOMAL ANNAMYCIN.” This patent is anticipated to be officially issued in the near future.

data.title: Administr introduces AI benefits admin platform cutting admin time by 60%, saving a week monthly. SAN FRANCISCO, Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: A seasoned industry expert has unveiled a new Software as a Service (SaaS) solution aimed at assisting insurance agencies in accelerating deal closures and recovering a complete work week every month. The company, Administr, has recently introduced its benefits administration software tailored to meet the needs of insurance agencies. This news was shared from San Francisco on Feb. 17, 2026.

data.title: Strike looms at Children’s Aid Society of Toronto due to understaffing and program cuts. CUPE Local 2316 sounds alarm.
data.description: Frontline workers at the Children’s Aid Society of Toronto, represented by CUPE Local 2316, are now in a legal strike position as they struggle with chronic understaffing and program cuts due to years of provincial underfunding. This has caused child welfare services to reach a breaking point, endangering children and families. With mounting strain on the system, the workers are sounding the alarm about the risks involved. In a press conference held on Tuesday, February 17 at 12:30 p.m., the union highlighted the urgent need for attention to this issue.

data.title: Housing blocks open for Equip Exposition 2026 in Louisville, booking fast. Industry members urged to reserve now.
data.description: Reserve your spot now as top hotels in Louisville, Kentucky are being booked rapidly for the Equip Exposition trade show set on February 17, 2026. Equip Exposition, known for being a global platform for landscape, outdoor living, and equipment industries, has made available housing blocks for interested attendees of the upcoming event. Those looking to participate in the 2026 show are urged to act fast due to the high demand. Secure accommodations promptly to guarantee your place at this significant industry gathering.

data.title: Alabama, along with partners, releases Human Trafficking Assessment in partnership with Engage Together®. Marks end of Phase 1.
data.description: In Montgomery, Alabama, the Office of the Attorney General, Alabama Anti-Human Trafficking Alliance, and The WellHouse disclosed the Alabama Statewide Human Trafficking Assessment during the Alabama Human Trafficking Summit. The assessment, created with Engage Together®, concludes Phase 1: Research & Reports by presenting a thorough, data-based analysis to enhance initiatives against human trafficking. This release aims to bolster prevention and intervention efforts in the state.

data.title: Sifted debuts SiftedAI Copilot, an AI platform for logistics. Leading in parcel spend management.
data.description: Sifted, a company based in Overland Park, Kansas, unveiled a new product called SiftedAI Copilot on Feb. 17, 2026. This tool serves as an always-on logistics analyst, utilizing Logistics Intelligence technology to assist with parcel spend management. SiftedAI Copilot is designed to be an enterprise-grade solution, offering an agentic AI overlay for businesses. This launch marks a significant step for Sifted in enhancing their services with advanced AI capabilities.

data.title: Cyrano Therapeutics reports successful Phase 2 trial of CYR-064 for smell loss, advancing to Phase 3 in 2H 20206.
data.description: A recent trial successfully achieved its primary safety benchmarks and important secondary efficacy goals, leading to the decision to move forward with Phase 3 development later in the second half of 2026. The trial results were promising for Cyrano Therapeutics, Inc., a regenerative medicine company based in DELRAY BEACH, Fla. This milestone marks a significant step towards further progress in their innovative work.

data.title: HireQuest, Inc. (#HQI) declares quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share, payable on March 16.
data.description: In Goose Creek, South Carolina, on February 17, 2026, HireQuest, Inc. (Nasdaq: HQI), a leading franchisor of on-demand staffing and executive search solutions, revealed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share. Shareholders are set to receive the dividend on March 16.

data.title: Verisk and S&P Global Energy partner to offer insurance-adjusted climate risk intelligence for finance and real estate industries.
data.description: A partnership has been formed to establish a common analytical base to assist in connecting sustainability, insurance, and financial modeling across various industries such as banking, asset management, and real estate investment. This collaboration involves entities in Jersey City, N.J., London, and New York, and was announced on February 17, 2026. This initiative aims to enhance the understanding and integration of sustainability factors into the realms of insurance and overall financial planning.
